{
  "news": [
    {
      "title": "巨鲸转10万COMP至币安",
      "summary": "链上数据显示，疑似Arrington Capital关联地址将10万枚COMP转入Binance。大额转入交易所通常预示潜在抛售，可能对COMP价格形成压力，并带动DeFi板块情绪走弱。需关注后续是否卖出。",
      "reason": "巨鲸异动，直接抛压信号，优先级一。",
      "category": "链上异动",
      "impact_coins": ["COMP"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "金色财经", "url": "https://jinse.com.cn/lives/511818.html"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "伊朗油轮遇袭，地缘紧张升级",
      "summary": "两艘伊朗油轮在霍尔木兹海峡附近遇袭，可能进一步加剧美伊冲突，推高油价并引发风险资产抛售。比特币等加密货币作为风险资产短期承压，但若局势恶化导致避险需求，也可能有资金流入。",
      "reason": "地缘政治事件，影响风险偏好，优先级二。",
      "category": "宏观经济",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC", "ETH"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "金色财经", "url": "https://jinse.com.cn/lives/511814.html"}],
      "urgency": "immediate"
    },
    {
      "title": "伊朗预计今日回应美国方案",
      "summary": "沙特媒体报道伊朗预计今天正式回应美国提出的14点提议评估。结果将决定市场走向：积极回应利好风险资产，消极回应加剧冲突。当前市场处于等待状态。",
      "reason": "地缘政治关键节点，影响市场情绪，优先级二。",
      "category": "宏观经济",
      "impact_coins": ["BTC", "ETH"],
      "signal": "neutral",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "金色财经", "url": "https://jinse.com.cn/lives/511811.html"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "BitMine或放缓ETH购买，接近供应目标",
      "summary": "分析师Tom Lee指出，BitMine持有的12亿美元ETH stash已接近5%供应目标，可能放缓买入。这将削弱ETH买盘力量，对ETH价格构成中长期利空。",
      "reason": "巨鲸行为信号，影响ETH供需，优先级一。",
      "category": "链上异动",
      "impact_coins": ["ETH"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 4,
      "sources": [{"name": "Unchained Crypto", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxORmZjWDRZb0dEQmpOWTVXT3Q4eDhEQXR3MzBBRGl0RDJNeXZDbk84WFNGanViNXMtdk5nVUI1cnhwci10WVI1YkY5SmtBR0xLTXhEVmhmMlJKWkRwOEtjSjVCbG1RUTFUQTE4aTNRc3h5aV9pTXA0NjNZQ01YWFV2ZW01dmZ5anBBQWpFN01vMThYU04zbUhGeXlrVkxFMVZLd21uUGQwaFFBa2pFdEJ0THg0YUE?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "days"
    },
    {
      "title": "Tether一个月冻结5.15亿USDT",
      "summary": "Tether在30天内冻结了371个地址上的5.15亿美元USDT。大规模冻结通常与合规或打击非法活动有关，可能减少USDT流通供应，短期对市场流动性造成压力，并引发稳定币风险担忧。",
      "reason": "稳定币供应变化，影响市场流动性，优先级二。",
      "category": "市场结构",
      "impact_coins": ["USDT", "BTC", "ETH"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "Bitcoin News", "url": "https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxNT2duZGlLVERScXlOVEpxWnFsMWgwaG5hUTEyQy1aREJnTXN4U3Zqd2phYi02VmlUa1NiZmRwSF9Qa280ZF8xcEQ0UUNoWUh6empiLUhFYkpWN2g3Z21UQkRoZ09fcll1TGE4U2I1WVBOTWZLcEVnV2U1RlU1d0xjQ2JhWkY3aWVvbHp1dHRZLTE5LS1fSlhjMDZRUW03VXVsYXFhTlJnNGI0b2o3SHFUeUFYcV8yaW95NHRZ?oc=5"}],
      "urgency": "hours"
    },
    {
      "title": "参议员Warren施压Meta稳定币",
      "summary": "美国参议员Elizabeth Warren向Meta施压，要求提供关于稳定币试点的详细信息，担心其规避监管。此举可能加强美国对稳定币的监管审查，对稳定币项目造成压力，进而影响整个加密市场。",
      "reason": "监管政策动态，影响稳定币及市场情绪，优先级二。",
      "category": "监管政策",
      "impact_coins": ["USDT", "USDC", "DAI"],
      "signal": "bearish",
      "impact_level": 3,
      "sources": [{"name": "The Block", "url": "https://www.theblock.co/post/400556/senator-warren-presses-meta-over-stablecoin-trial-ahead-of-2026-rollout-plans"}],
      "urgency": "days"
    },
    {
      "title": "Upbit上线PROS，价格飙升",
      "summary": "韩国交易所Upbit宣布上线PROS的韩元、BTC及USDT交易对，PROS价格已突破1 USDT。上币效应带来短期买盘，但需注意利好兑现后的回调风险。",
      "reason": "交易所上币，直接影响对应币种，优先级一。",
      "category": "交易所",
      "impact_coins": ["PROS"],
      "signal": "bullish",
      "impact_level": 2,
      "sources": [{"name": "金色财经", "url": "https://jinse.com.cn/lives/511815.html"}],
      "urgency": "immediate"
    }
  ]
